niche: WorthScan used commuter bike resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a five-slide WorthScan package for a used commuter bike listing near campus.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Compare frame brand, wheel size, drivetrain condition, tire/brake wear, accessories, and three local bicycle listings before giving a range.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Use only manually reviewed Creative Center examples and local operator notes. Do not scrape or automate any platform.

trend_examples.hook: Scan this bike before you pay campus prices
trend_examples.notes: Item-first hook, visible asking price, and a fast buy/pass payoff.

trend_examples.hook: The cheap listing gets expensive after repairs
trend_examples.notes: Repair-risk reveal gives viewers a reason to keep swiping.

trend_examples.hook: I checked three local comps before I answered
trend_examples.notes: Comparable cards make the final range feel grounded.

notes: Paid generation, browser UI, scraping, and social publishing are disabled.
Manual posting records are created only after human posting.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this commuter bike before you pay
slides.visual_direction: Show the full bike and asking price from an approved listing screenshot.
Crop the badge, wheel size, shifters, chain, and brake condition.
Use three simple comp cards with price, condition, and distance.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract tires, brakes, rust, and tuneup
slides.visual_direction: Highlight one repair risk and a rough repair-cost range.

slides.on_screen_text: Worth range: buy, negotiate, or pass
slides.visual_direction: Show estimated range, confidence, and a comment-scan prompt.

output_requirements.caption: Would you pay the asking price for this commuter bike? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan gives a resale estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: Before you pay for this commuter bike, scan the listing like a reseller. Confirm the exact model and size, compare three local bike listings, subtract tires, brakes, rust, and tuneup risk, then call the answer a range: buy, negotiate, or pass.
posting_notes: Replace placeholders with approved listing images before posting.
Verify local bike comps on the posting day.
Do not claim a guaranteed appraisal or exact value.
Post manually only after human approval.

qa_notes: Provider policy disables paid, browser, social, and account actions.
